subject: The EP-WXT trigger 01709248635 is likely a flaring star
body:
Y.-H. I. Yin (HKU), B.-T. Wang (YNAO), H.-Z. Wu (HUST) and W. D. Zhang (NAOC) on behalf of the Einstein Probe (EP) team:

The EP-WXT trigger 01709248635 at the time of 2025-11-21T16:11:59, is likely a stellar flare associated with a T Tauri Star HD 285751. The estimated flux of the flare is around 1.0e-10 erg/s/cm^2 in 0.5-4.0 keV, corresponding to an X-ray luminosity of around 1.3e32 erg/s. 

Launched on January 9, 2024, EP is a space X-ray observatory to monitor the soft X-ray sky with X-ray follow-up capability (Yuan et al. 2022, Handbook of X-ray and Gamma-ray Astrophysics).
